summary: Certified Cybersecurity Analyst (Security+) focused on Blue Teaming and Incident Response. Demonstrated practical understanding of SOC workflows by deploying simulated environments and configuring Splunk SIEM for log ingestion and event correlation. Leveraging strong Python skills to develop custom tooling for threat intelligence and IOC extraction, aiming to accelerate alert triage and reduce manual operational overhead.

bullets: Conducted comprehensive security audits on backend data flows to identify misconfigurations. Collaborated cross-functionally to validate input controls and enhance application security logging, ensuring rigorous auditing and visibility against injection attacks.
Implemented secure data extraction pipelines, maintaining data confidentiality and integrity while handling structured administrative reports.

projects.title: Enterprise SOC & Incident Response Home Lab
projects.subtitle: Active Directory & Splunk SIEM Environment
projects.description: Architected a virtualized enterprise network utilizing Active Directory and configured Splunk SIEM for centralized log aggregation and proactive threat monitoring.
bullets: Architected a virtualized enterprise network utilizing Active Directory and configured Splunk SIEM for centralized log aggregation.

Executed adversary emulation techniques (e.g., credential access, authentication bypass) to validate SIEM detection rules, fine-tune alert thresholds, and ensure accurate telemetry generation for proactive monitoring.

Investigated security alerts utilizing Splunk Search Processing Language (SPL) to parse Windows Event Logs (e.g., Event IDs 4625, 4720), mapped threat behaviors to the MITRE ATT&CK framework, and formulated actionable containment reports.

projects.title: Automated Threat Intelligence & Static Analysis Tooling
projects.subtitle: Python OSINT & Malware Triage Utilities
projects.description: Developed custom Python workflows to aggregate public threat intelligence and perform automated static malware analysis by extracting critical IOCs.
bullets: Developed custom Python utilities integrating VirusTotal and Shodan APIs to aggregate public threat intelligence.

Engineered an automated static malware analysis pipeline via Python to extract critical IOCs (Hashes, PE Headers), significantly accelerating the initial threat triage and incident containment workflows.

projects.title: InfraFix
projects.subtitle: IaC Security Validator & Configuration Auditor
projects.description: A Python utility to automatically parse and validate Infrastructure as Code (IaC) configuration files against established security baselines.
bullets: Developed a Python utility to automatically parse and validate Infrastructure as Code (IaC) configuration files against established security baselines.
Designed the tool to proactively identify common misconfigurations and access control flaws, demonstrating a practical approach to preventative vulnerability management.
